protein_name: Receptor for members of the ephrin-A family. Binds to EFNA3, EFNA4 and EFNA5. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. Tyr protein kinase family. Ephrin receptor subfamily. Mainly expressed in testis. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
